subcodes.first_line: By God! The Promised One hath appeared - He Who was inscribed in the Books of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, He hath come by command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله قد اتی الموعود الذی کان مسطورا فی کتب الله المهیمن القیوم انه اتی بامر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
